description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Core that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python, install dependencies with pip and tox, run codespell on Linux, execute core system info and integration tests under specific conditions, and send a Slack notification on failure.
